overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character with a large backpack walking along a rocky riverbank at night in light rain. The character traverses from dry rocky terrain into shallow water while the camera follows steadily, eventually tilting upward to reveal starry skies and towering mountains.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky riverbank carrying a large backpack with glowing indicators

entered.detail: uneven rocky terrain along the water's edge where the character walks
dark flowing water of the river alongside the path
large mountain silhouettes visible against the dark sky in the background
sparse trees dotting the hillside to the right of the river

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky riverbank at night in light rain. The terrain is uneven gravel and stone beside dark flowing water, with distant mountains silhouetted against the cloudy sky and scattered trees visible on the right hillside.

events.description: character steps from dry rocky shore into shallow river water

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow river water along the shoreline

entered.detail: shallow river water that the character is now walking through

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the rocky shore into shallow river water, continuing to walk along the water's edge. The river water surrounds the character's feet while distant mountains remain visible ahead, and the rain continues to fall in the low light.

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal starry sky and towering mountain peaks

agents.ego_description: continuing through shallow water while the view opens up to reveal the starry sky above

entered.detail: clear night sky filled with visible stars as the camera tilts upward

segments.scene_description: The character continues wading through the shallow river as the camera tilts upward to reveal a magnificent starry sky and towering snow-capped mountains. The surrounding landscape opens up to show the vast scale of the mountain range against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark riverbank that transitions from dry, rocky terrain into the shallow flow of a river. It begins with the character traversing uneven gravel and stone under a cloudy night sky, with scattered trees on a hillside and silhouetted mountains in the distance. As the character moves forward through the light rain, the camera tracks their steady progress toward the water's edge. The scene then shifts as the character steps off the shore and into the river, with the shallow water surrounding their feet while the distant mountains remain fixed on the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a close perspective of a river crossing to a sweeping reveal of a vast mountain wilderness. It begins with the character wading through the shallow waters of the river, maintaining a steady forward momentum. As the character progresses, the camera gradually tilts upward, shifting the focus from the immediate terrain to the horizon. The scene then opens up to reveal a magnificent starry sky and towering snow-capped mountains that dominate the night. Finally, the perspective expands fully to showcase the immense scale of the mountain range against the celestial backdrop.
